source_jobs.title: Junior Database Administrator
source_jobs.description:
Crossjoin Solutions, founded in 2009, is a Portuguese IT company serving over 30 clients across Europe, Latin America, and North America. Through our services, we support tens of millions of consumers in numerous countries worldwide..

We provide consulting services across a broad range of sectors reliant on information systems, including banking, insurance, healthcare, automotive, finance, and telecommunications. Our expertise covers end-to-end performance optimization, enterprise testing, major incident troubleshooting and resolution, full-stack architecture advisory, continuous integration, deployment acceleration, and infrastructure managed services.



You will be integrated in our Academy!

At this Academy, you will be challenged with intensive training, both theoretical and in realistic labs, so you can be ready for Crossjoin's projects. Here, you’ll not only sharpen your technical abilities but also refine your soft skills, preparing you to face real-world challenges.



Requirements:

 - Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science or a related field

 - No prior professional experience required

 - Strong resilience in problem-solving and performing under pressure

 - High level of autonomy and sense of responsibility

 - Excellent organizational and time management skills

 - Effective communication skills

Responsabilities:

 - Install, configure, upgrade, maintain and Administrate open-source databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL/MariaDB, ElasticSearch, MongoDB, etc.).

 - Ensure high availability, backups, replication, and disaster recovery.

 - Monitor performance, tune queries.

 - Apply security patches, manage access, and enforce data protection.

 - Automate routine tasks and maintain monitoring/alerting systems.

 - Document environments, procedures, and best practices.

 - Evaluate and implement improvements for reliability, scalability, and cost.

We offer:

 - Health Insurance (also available for your immediate family)

 - Crosser Assistance Program (support in psychology, psychosocial, financial, legal, and nutrition matters)

 - Structured Individual Development Plan (IDP)

 - Transparent company-wide Career Plan

 - Monthly gym subscription

 - Regular team-building events
   
   

Ready to kick off your career as a Junior Database Administrator? Join us at Crossjoin Solutions and become part of an ambitious and supportive team!

With the submission of your application you authorise the treatment and storage of your personal data within Crossjoin Solutions, Lda database for this recruitment process and/or other future opportunities.

source_jobs.title: Spontaneous Applications
source_jobs.description:
At Crossjoin, we’re always on the lookout for talented and passionate people who want to make a difference.

Even if you don’t see an open position that matches your profile, we’d love to hear from you! Whether you're an experienced professional or just starting your journey, your skills and motivation might be exactly what we need.

Send your spontaneous application through our application form!

source_jobs.title: Senior Office Management
source_jobs.description:
Crossjoin Solutions, founded in 2009, is a Portuguese IT company serving over 30 clients across Europe, Latin America, and North America. Through our services, we support tens of millions of consumers in numerous countries worldwide..
We provide consulting services across a broad range of sectors reliant on information systems, including banking, insurance, healthcare, automotive, finance, and telecommunications. Our expertise covers end-to-end performance optimization, enterprise testing, major incident troubleshooting and resolution, full-stack architecture advisory, continuous integration, deployment acceleration, and infrastructure managed services.


Responsibilities:

 - Analyze and manage employee databases

 - Coordinate occupational health appointments and medical exams

 - Manage support for employees and suppliers

 - Oversee orders, consumables, and equipment inventory control

 - Process requests for meal cards and benefits

 - Manage IT equipment and office supplies

 - Collaborate with external service providers

 - Organize and maintain digital archives (GDPR compliance)

Requirements (Must Have):

 - Completed secondary education (12º ano) or Bachelor’s degree (preferably in Management, HR, or related fields)

 - Minimum 5 years of proven experience in Office Management or Administrative Management roles

 - Advanced knowledge of Microsoft Excel (formulas, pivot tables, data analysis)

 - Solid understanding of Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Sheets, Calendar)

 - English level B2 or higher (oral and written communication)

Nice to Have:

 - Experience with Jira

We offer:

 - Integration in a dynamic, goal-oriented and cooperative team;

 - Health Insurance extensible to the family;

 - Crosser Assistance Program (Psychology, Psychosocial, Financial, Legal and Nutrition consultations);

 - Career Plan transversal to the entire company;

 - Monthly gym subscription;

 - Team-building events.

With the submission of your application you authorise the treatment and storage of your personal data within Crossjoin Solutions, Lda database for this recruitment process and/or other future opportunities.

source_jobs.title: Junior IT Support Analyst
source_jobs.description:
Crossjoin Solutions, founded in 2009, is a Portuguese IT company serving over 30 clients across Europe, Latin America, and North America. Through our services, we support tens of millions of consumers in numerous countries worldwide..

We provide consulting services across a broad range of sectors reliant on information systems, including banking, insurance, healthcare, automotive, finance, and telecommunications. Our expertise covers end-to-end performance optimization, enterprise testing, major incident troubleshooting and resolution, full-stack architecture advisory, continuous integration, deployment acceleration, and infrastructure managed services.



You will be integrated in our Academy!

At this Academy, you will be challenged with intensive training, both theoretical and in realistic labs, so you can be ready for Crossjoin's projects. Here, you’ll not only sharpen your technical abilities but also refine your soft skills, preparing you to face real-world challenges.



Responsabilities:

 - User Support: Provide first-level technical support for hardware, software, and network issues reported by colleagues.

 - Onboarding & Offboarding: Set up user accounts, configure and deploy hardware/software for new employees, deactivate accounts, and collect equipment for departures.

 - Basic Network & Server Maintenance: Assist senior IT staff in monitoring network performance, checking logs, and supporting evolving infrastructure needs.

 - Documentation & Internal Guides: Create and update guides and documentation for resolving frequent IT issues.

 - Security & Incident Support: Act as the first responder to security or suspicious activity reports; facilitate information gathering and escalation.

 - Scripting & Automation: Maintain and write basic automation scripts (e.g., with Python) for repetitive tasks.

 - Internal Tool Support: Troubleshoot user-reported issues, apply minor updates, and ensure smooth operation of internally developed tools.
   
   

Requirements:

 - Bachelor's degree in Computer Science

 - Minimum 1 year of proven experience in an IT field

 - Hands-on experience with first-line technical support

 - Involvement in projects related to system administration, networking, or IT security

 - Resilience in problem-solving and pressure situations

 - Autonomy and responsibility

 - Strong organizational and time management skills

 - Effective communication skills

Technical Skills (required or willingness to learn)

 - Operating systems: Windows, Linux, MacOS

 - Networking: Basic understanding (TCP/IP, VLANs, firewalls, switches, WiFi)

 - Virtualization concepts

 - Containerization: Docker, Kubernetes (fundamentals)

 - Databases: Postgres, MySQL

 - Security fundamentals: VPN, firewall, SIEM, monitoring



Nice to Have

 - Programming: Python, Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, Node.js (TypeScript)

 - Google Cloud Platform (GCP) exposure (VertexAI, Cloud SQL, etc.)



We offer:

 - Health Insurance extensible to the family;

 - Crosser Assistance Program (Psychology, Psychosocial, Financial, Legal and Nutrition consultations);

 - A well-structured Individual Development Plan (IDP);

 - Career Plan transversal to the entire company;

 - Monthly gym subscription;

 - Team-building events.



With the submission of your application you authorise the treatment and storage of your personal data within Crossjoin Solutions, Lda database for this recruitment process and/or other future opportunities.

source_jobs.title: Junior Tech Consultant (Open to All Sciences & Engineering)
source_jobs.description:
Are you passionate about technology, but your academic background isn’t in computer science? No problem! Crossjoin Solutions is the perfect starting point to enter the world of technology and develop the skills needed to work on challenging and innovative projects.

Founded in 2009, we are a Portuguese IT company serving over 35 clients in Europe, Latin America, and North America. Through our services, we support tens of millions of consumers in various countries around the world.

We provide consulting services across a wide range of industries that rely on information systems, including banking, insurance, healthcare, automotive, finance, and telecommunications. Our expertise covers end-to-end performance optimization, business testing, resolution and handling of critical incidents, full-stack architecture consulting, continuous integration, deployment acceleration, and infrastructure management services.

"The Challenge: What Will You Actually Be Doing?

As a Crosser, you won’t be limited to a single traditional technology. Your challenge will be to understand how vast IT ecosystems work - spanning Software Delevopment, System Integration and DevOps - helping our clients make their system faster, more secure, and more efficient.

After completing your training at Crossjoin Academy, you’ll join a multidisciplinary project where you’ll:

Analyze and solve problems: Dive deep into complex systems to identify performance bottlenecks and solve critical technical challenges.

Simplify and automate: Turn manual, repetitive setup tasks into smart, automatic scripts. Make sure servers and systems are configured exactly the same way every time, reducing human error and making background updates a smooth, predictable process.

Maintain and stabilize: Keep the foundational systems behind our software connected, stable, and running smoothly. Handle the challenge of upgrading environments, managing code and system configurations, ensuring seamless integration without interrupting the people who rely on the client's services every day.

Requirements:

 - Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering or exact sciences (Mathematics, Physics, etc.).

 - Passion for technology and problem-solving.

 - Willingness to learn and step out of your comfort zone.

 - Analytical thinking and logical reasoning.

 - English proficiency (written and spoken).

 - Portuguese proficiency (written and spoken).

 - Programing skill in at least one language.

What we provide:

 - Health Insurance extensible to the family;

 - Crosser Assistance Program (Psychology, Psychosocial, Financial, Legal and Nutrition consultations);

 - A well-structured Individual Development Plan (IDP);

 - Career Plan transversal to the entire company;

 - Monthly gym subscription (Urban Sports);

 - Team-building events.

Join us and start your journey in IT with Crossjoin!

source_jobs.title: Junior Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Crossjoin Solutions is experiencing dynamic worldwide growth!

We are a global IT consulting company, founded in Portugal, and now delivering impactful, worldwide projects across Europe, LATAM, and North America.

We're looking for individuals who are curious, adaptable, and truly driven by a passion for technology. If you're ready to learn, grow, and make a real impact, we want to hear from you.


What you will do:

 - Learn from our experienced professionals and work on real-world projects.

 - Develop skills in performance optimization, our core area of expertise, while building a diverse skillset.

 - Engage in a variety of missions, adapting to different client needs and technological challenges.

 - Work with cutting-edge technologies and contribute to Crossjoin's mission of delivering top-tier solutions.

 - Benefit from our commitment to continuous learning with mentoring training, and certifications in the latest technologies. You’ll become a specialist in a high-demand field, building a career with immense growth potential.


Required Skills & Competencies

 - Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Science or similar field;

 - No professional experience needed;

 - Understand different concepts around programming languages like Java, C, C++, Python, and SQL;

 - Understand different variations around databases SQL and NoSQL, like MySQL, PostgreSQL, Cassandra, MongoDB;

 - Excellent communication, resilient and goal-oriented;

 - Driven by technology and challenges;

 - Be able to write and speak in English;

 - Be able to travel.



We offer:

 - Health Insurance extendable to the family

 - Crosser Assistance Program (Psychology, Psychosocial, Financial, Legal, and Nutrition consultations)

 - A well-structured Individual Development Plan (IDP)

 - Career Plan transversal to the entire company

 - Monthly gym subscription

 - Team-building events
   
   

Ready to join a company where performance meets purpose?
Apply now and become part of our international growth story.

notes: IT consulting company with a strong focus on technology and innovation
